text.title: Indie Postmortem Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Indie Postmortem Template.

example.scenario: Solo founder after a failed Product Hunt launch: timeline 6 events; 3 factors (mis-timed reveal, weak headline, no warm list); 2 follow-ups (rebuild warm list, draft pre-launch checklist); 25 min total.
